overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring dimly lit, industrial interior quarters. The character moves from a green-lit bunk room with exposed ceiling pipes into a larger common area bathed in red emergency lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceship crew quarters with bunk beds

events.description: character looks upward at exposed ceiling pipes and ventilation ductwork

agents.ego_description: standing in a dimly lit green room, looking around the bunk area and examining the ceiling infrastructure

tall metal storage locker against the green wall
rectangular fluorescent light fixture emitting greenish light
bed with colorful striped blanket and pillow

doorway frame leading to adjacent room with red lighting visible beyond

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a narrow, green-lit crew quarters featuring a metal bunk bed and industrial storage lockers. The camera pans up to reveal exposed ceiling pipes before the character begins moving toward the exit doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: common area with red emergency lighting

events.description: character exits the green-lit bunk room into a larger common area
ambient lighting shifts from green to red as character enters the new space

agents.ego_description: walking through the doorway into a larger room illuminated by red emergency lights

entered.detail: red glowing light fixture illuminating the common area
tall metal storage shelves with various equipment
simple metal folding chair near the shelving
structural support column in the center of the common room
countertop with storage cabinets and appliances
blue floor mat at the room entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the doorway into a larger common area bathed in red emergency lighting. The space features metal shelving units, a central support pillar, and kitchen facilities, contrasting with the cramped green quarters left behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, green-lit crew quarters into a spacious common area bathed in red emergency lighting. It begins with the character standing beside a metal bunk bed and industrial lockers, with the camera panning upward to reveal exposed ceiling pipes. As the character moves toward the exit, the narrow confines of the quarters give way to a doorway that opens into a larger industrial space. The scene then shifts in tone and color as the camera enters the common area, passing metal shelving units and a central support pillar. Finally, the movement reveals kitchen facilities, completing the transition from the intimate green quarters to the stark, red-lit expanse of the shared facility.
